about.title: About Bayes
about.subtitle: Empowering Chinese Companies Going Global
about.description: Bayes Global is a service provider specializing in qualitative research recruitment and fieldwork execution in emerging overseas markets (Latin America, Middle East, Southeast Asia, etc.). Registered in Hong Kong, China, we have an international operating platform and compliant settlement capabilities.
about.mission: We are committed to bridging significant language and cultural gaps by providing 'one-stop, high-compliance, 100% authentic' qualitative execution services, delivering the most authentic user voices for Chinese companies' deep insights.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.name: Griffin Wang
leadership.quote: With 18 years in the industry, I know that one fake respondent can destroy all insight logic in qualitative research. Bringing a senior researcher's perspective to achieve 'absolute authenticity' of respondents in emerging markets is the core soul of Bayes.
background: Dual Background: Previously served at Baidu, 58, TNS, Horizon, iResearch and other top internet companies and market research institutions in China, holding positions as Senior User Researcher, Research Manager, and Project Manager
Forward-thinking Perspective: Examining execution with an analyst's mindset, from risk prediction to anomaly detection, breaking barriers between 'design' and 'implementation'
Quality Bottom Line: Committed to injecting rigorous research logic into overseas fieldwork, redefining high standards for data collection for Chinese companies going global

partner.title: The Partner Advantage
partner.subtitle: We eliminate the risks and complexities of working with Chinese clients

items.title: 100% Payment Security
items.desc: Never worry about chasing an invoice again. As your general contractor, we secure all project funds upfront via our Hong Kong entity, guaranteeing your payments are on time, every time.

items.title: Access High-Value Projects
items.desc: Stop wasting resources on uncertain leads. We bring you a curated pipeline of pre-qualified projects from China's leading globalizing companies, complete with clear scopes and realistic budgets.

items.title: Streamlined Partnership
items.desc: We bridge cultural and language gaps, translate client needs into actionable SOWs, and manage the entire project lifecycle for you, acting as your single expert point of contact.

steps.title: Receive Project Brief
steps.desc: We send you a pre-qualified project brief with a clear SOW. You review and provide your expert quote. No wasted time.

steps.title: Execute Flawlessly
steps.desc: Once selected, you focus purely on fieldwork execution. We handle all client communication and project management.

steps.title: Get Paid On Time
steps.desc: Upon successful delivery of project milestones, you submit your invoice to us and receive prompt payment directly from our Hong Kong entity.

requirements.title: Partner Requirements
requirements.subtitle: We are currently vetting high-quality fieldwork partners globally

items.title: Basic Qualifications
points: Company registration proof, business license (not individual workshops)
ESOMAR, MRS (UK), CASRO/IA (US) or similar association membership

items.title: Capability & Coverage
points: Own resource database and recruitment network
Expertise in B2C mass market or B2B high-difficulty populations
Professional facilities: stable network, qualitative research venues

items.title: Security & Compliance
points: LGPD and local data privacy law compliance
PII handling procedures and informed consent
Data storage location and encryption standards

items.title: Quality Control SOP
points: Pre-interview activation QC with N+50% buffer
